findings.source: ATXMEGA32A4U is XMEGA A4U (A-series), not XMEGA E. This datasheet is XMEGA E manual covering only XMEGA E-series devices; ATXMEGA32A4U not listed in feature summary table on page 5
ATXMEGA32A4U not in this XMEGA E manual datasheet
ATXMEGA32A4U not in this XMEGA E manual datasheet
ATXMEGA32A4U not in this XMEGA E manual datasheet
ATXMEGA32A4U not in this XMEGA E manual datasheet
ATXMEGA32A4U not in this XMEGA E manual datasheet
Table 1-1 SAM C20 Device-specific Features page 14: ATSAMC20J18 Flash=256 KB
Table 1-1 SAM C20 Device-specific Features page 14: ATSAMC20J18 SRAM=32 KB

Features bullet page 1: '1/2/4/8 KB independent self-programmable Flash for EEPROM emulation'; J18 is 256K Flash variant with 8 KB Flash RWW (Table 1-4 page 16); not hardware EEPROM but Flash for EEPROM emulation
Features bullets page 1-3 do not mention op amps; Table 1-4 SAM C20 Family Features (page 16) does not list op amps
Features bullet page 2 explicitly states '10-bit, 350 ksps Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC) in the SAM C21'; SAM C20 family has no DAC. Table 1-4 SAM C20 Family Features (page 16) does not list DAC
SAM C20 has no DAC (DAC is C21 only per features page 2)
Table 1-4 SAM C20 Family Features page 16: Real-Time Counter (RTC) Yes for all C20 variants including C20J. Features bullet page 2: '32-bit Real Time Counter (RTC) with clock/calendar function'
Table 1-4 SAM C20 Family Features page 16: Watchdog Timer (WDT) Yes for all C20 variants. Features bullet page 2: 'Watchdog Timer (WDT)'
Features page 1: 'Arm Cortex-M0+ CPU running at up to 48 MHz or 64 MHz'; Table 1-4 page 16: 'Maximum CPU frequency 48 / 64 MHz'
Table 1-4 page 16: SAM C20J Flash RWW section 8/4/2/1 KB; for J18 (256K Flash variant) RWW=8 KB. This is the read-while-write Flash for EEPROM emulation
Features page 1: '-40C to +125C, DC to 48 MHz' and '-40C to +85C, DC to 64 MHz'
Features page 1: '-40C to +125C'; AEC-Q100 Grade 1 (-40C to 125C) per Qualification page 2

PIC32CM5164JH01032 is PIC32CM JH01 family (512K Flash, 64K SRAM); this datasheet covers only PIC32CM JH00 family (32K/64K Flash variants: PIC32CM3204JH00xxx and PIC32CM6408JH00xxx per page 12 table). Part not in datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
PIC32CM5164JH01032 not in this JH00 datasheet
Features page 1 lists 'EEPROM hardware emulation (SmartEEPROM)' as part of Flash; no dedicated hardware EEPROM. SAM D5x/E5x emulates EEPROM in Flash, not a separate EEPROM peripheral with byte count
Features pages 1-3 list ADC, DAC, AC (Analog Comparators), Temperature sensors, but no Op Amps; Configuration Summary Table 1-2 page 18 has no Op Amps column
Features page 3: 'Dual 12-bit, 1 MSPS output Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC)'; Table 1-2 page 18 SAMD51P20 row shows DAC channels = 2 (SAMD51P19 inherits same since blank)
Features page 3: 'Dual 12-bit, 1 MSPS output Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC)'; Table 1-2 page 18 DAC (Channels) = 2 for SAMD51P20 row
Features page 3: '32-bit Real Time Counter (RTC) with clock/calendar function'; Table 1-2 page 18 RTC = Y
Features page 3: 'Watchdog Timer (WDT) with Window mode'; Table 1-2 page 18 WDT = Y
Features page 1: 'Core: 120 MHz Arm Cortex-M4', '1.71V to 3.63V, -40C to +105C, DC to 120 MHz' and 'DC to 120 MHz' at +85C
Features page 1 lists single Flash region (1MB/512KB/256KB) with EEPROM emulation; no separate auxiliary/data Flash mentioned. SAMD51P19 has 512 KB Flash only
Features page 1: '1.71V to 3.63V, -40C to +125C, DC to 100 MHz'
Features page 1: '-40C to +125C, DC to 100 MHz'; Qualification page 4: 'AEC-Q100 Grade 1 (-40C to 125C)'
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet. This datasheet (70139G) covers dsPIC30F2011/2012/3012/3013 only; family table page 4 lists only those four parts
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet (covers dsPIC30F2011/2012/3012/3013)
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet (family bullet page 3 mentions WDT but part is not listed)
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet
DSPIC30F3014 not in this datasheet
Table 2 page 6 (Motor Control Families with No CAN FD): dsPIC33CK256MC103 Pins=36 (UQFN package)
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 I2C=1. Features page 3: 'One I2C module with SMBus Support'
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 UART=3. Features page 3: 'Three Protocol UARTs'
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 ADC External Channels=17
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 Comparators=2. Features page 2: 'Two Analog Comparators'
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 Op Amp=3. Features page 2: 'Up to Three Op Amps'
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 12-bit DACs=2. Features page 2: 'Two 12-Bit DACs'
Features page 2: 'Two 12-Bit DACs: Hardware slope compensation, One buffered DAC output'; pin DACOUT shown on 28-pin pinout
Features page 3 Safety Features: 'Dual Watchdog Timer (WDT)'. Table 2 page 6 WDT=1
Features page 1: '128-256 Kbytes of Program Flash with ECC and 16-32K Data RAM'; only main Flash plus '384 Bytes of One-Time-Programmable (OTP) Memory'; no separate auxiliary/data Flash
Table 2 page 6: dsPIC33CK256MC103 CLC=4
Features page 1: '3V to 3.6V, -40C to +125C' and '3V to 3.6V, -40C to +150C'
Features page 1: '-40C to +150C, DC to 70 MIPS'; AEC-Q100 Grade 0 (-40C to +150C) per Qualification page 4
ATMEGA640 not in this datasheet. This datasheet covers ATmega165A/PA/325A/PA/3250A/PA/645A/P/6450A/P only (per title page 1). ATmega640 is a different family (ATmega640/1280/1281/2560/2561)

ATTINY817 is tinyAVR 1-series (8 KB Flash, has DAC). This datasheet covers ATtiny804/806/807/1604/1606/1607 of tinyAVR 0-series only (page 1 introduction). ATTINY817 not listed
ATTINY817 not in this datasheet (tinyAVR 0-series doesn't include 817)
ATTINY817 not in this datasheet
ATTINY817 not in this datasheet (family bullet has RTC for 0-series but 817 is 1-series)

Table 1 page 2: dsPIC33EP512GM604 Op Amps/Comparators=4/5 (4 op amps). Features page 1: 'Up to Four Op Amp/Comparators'
Features pages 1-2 do not mention DAC; Table 1 page 2 has no DAC column. dsPIC33EP GM family has Op Amps and Comparators but no DAC peripheral listed
No DAC peripheral on dsPIC33EP512GM604 per Table 1 page 2 and features pages 1-2
Features page 1: 'Independent Watchdog Timer (WDT)'

Features page 1 lists single Flash 'Up to 24 Kbytes on-chip Flash' (note this is dsPIC30 page); for dsPIC33EP512GM604 page 2 Table 1: Program Flash Memory=512 Kbytes; no separate auxiliary/data Flash mentioned
Features page 1: '3.0V to 3.6V, -40C to +85C, up to 70 MIPS' and '3.0V to 3.6V, -40C to +125C, up to 60 MIPS'
Features page 1: '-40C to +125C, up to 60 MIPS'; AEC-Q100 REVG Grade 1 (-40C to +125C) Planned per page 1
Features pages 1-2 list ADC and Comparators only; no Op Amps in Analog Features section. Table 2 page 3 (PIC32MX6XX) for PIC32MX675F512H has no Op Amp column
Features pages 1-2 Analog Features list only ADC and Comparators; no DAC peripheral. Table 2 page 3 has no DAC column
No DAC peripheral on PIC32MX675F512H per Table 2 page 3 and features
Features page 1: 'Real-Time Clock and Calendar (RTCC) module'
Features page 1: 'Independent Watchdog Timer'
Features page 1: 'Core: 80 MHz/105 DMIPS MIPS32 M4K' and '2.3V to 3.6V, -40C to +105C, DC to 80 MHz'
Table 2 page 3 PIC32MX675F512H: Program Memory = '512 + 12(1)' KB; Note 1: 'This device features 12 KB boot Flash memory'. The 12 KB boot Flash is separate from the 512 KB main program Flash
